name: Caste Game | RPG
description:
A single card decides your destiny.

.

§

.

Warning

Possible violence, sexual assault, dubcon, noncon, bullying, power play, etc

.

§

.

Caste Game is a open-secret role play society game in Lexus Academy. Lexus Academy is an all males academy. Players included in this game are only students. Each person in Lexus Academy, whether students, teachers, or even staffs, knows that Caste Game is operating there. Though, no one outside Lexus Academy knows about Caste Game. The students who graduated from there kept the secrecy of the game. Caste Game had been passed from generation to another generation. No one dare to speak up about it since it has been a tradition among the Lexus Academy. Even if people try to seek help to outsiders, no one will believe in them.

.

Each class (A to E) from Year 1 to Year 5 rolls the role in Caste Game every year. Rolling Time being done at the start of the year. In the Rolling Time, each student must search for a card scattered around Lexus Academy area by the Student Council.

.

In Caste Game, there are 7 Caste or social hierarchy based on what card they get in the rolling time:

(1) King : his role is to rule the class, the ruler of the class, his order is absolute, people from lower hierarchy choose to please him rather than making him mad.

(2) Queen : his role is to be King's companion, the King's companion or partner, his order is absolute after the King.

(3) Jack : his role is to give advice to the King and Queen, and to be the intermediary between King-Queen and others from lower hierarchy, the Advisor.

(4) Number 10, Number 9, Number 8 : their role are the same as the Nobles in kingdom setting, lower than King, Queen, and Jack, higher than High-living Commoners, Low-living Commoners, and Waste.

(5) Number 7, Number 6, Number 5 : their role are the same as High-living Commoners in kingdom setting, lower than King, Q
